tasks.subject: Task 1: Design system + app shell + bottom nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Broadcast Sport tokens + core component kit + /pool/[code] shell layout with bottom tab bar and Home landing.

**Verify:** env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/globals.css","app/layout.tsx","app/pool/[code]/layout.tsx","components/ui/StatRow.tsx","components/ui/ScoreCard.tsx","components/ui/DeltaChip.tsx","components/ui/StatTile.tsx","components/ui/BottomNav.tsx","components/ui/Pill.tsx","components/ui/Skeleton.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"env $ENV npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["tokens in globals.css","3 fonts via next/font","BottomNav 5 tabs active=gold","kit renders tabular+leader glow","build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Restyle existing screens (Table, Bracket, Chat)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move leaderboard/bracket+groups/chat into nested routes under the shell, restyled with the kit. Data layer unchanged.

**Verify:** npx vitest run && env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/pool/[code]/table/page.tsx","app/pool/[code]/bracket/page.tsx","app/pool/[code]/chat/page.tsx","app/pool/[code]/Bracket.tsx","app/pool/[code]/Chat.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run && env $ENV npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["/table via StatRow","/bracket restyled","/chat restyled","31 tests green","build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ScoreSnapshot table + Home dashboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ScoreSnapshot history (deduped on each recompute) + personalized Home landing.

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/pool/snapshot.test.ts lib/pool/home.test.ts && env $ENV npx tsx scripts/verify-snapshots.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["prisma/schema.prisma","lib/pool/snapshot.ts","lib/pool/snapshot.test.ts","lib/pool/home.ts","lib/pool/home.test.ts","lib/pool/scoring.ts","app/pool/[code]/page.tsx","scripts/verify-snapshots.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run lib/pool/snapshot.test.ts lib/pool/home.test.ts && env $ENV npx tsx scripts/verify-snapshots.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["ScoreSnapshot model+indexes+migration","shouldWriteSnapshot dedupe tested","recompute writes snapshots","buildHome tested","Home renders","verify-snapshots passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Match Center + match detail + What-if
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Match list, match detail (pick-split + live swing), client-side What-if via the pure scoring engine.

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/pool/whatif.test.ts lib/pool/match-center.test.ts && env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/pool/whatif.ts","lib/pool/whatif.test.ts","lib/pool/match-center.ts","lib/pool/match-center.test.ts","app/pool/[code]/matches/page.tsx","app/pool/[code]/matches/[no]/page.tsx","app/pool/[code]/matches/[no]/WhatIf.tsx","app/api/pool/[id]/picks/route.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run lib/pool/whatif.test.ts lib/pool/match-center.test.ts && env $ENV npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["pickSplit tested","projectStandings+applyWhatIf tested","match list+detail","client what-if","picks API members-only","build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Player Profile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-entry profile: accuracy, knockout ✓/✗ hit-grid, category points, boldest call.

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/pool/profile.test.ts && env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/pool/profile.ts","lib/pool/profile.test.ts","app/pool/[code]/u/[entryId]/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run lib/pool/profile.test.ts && env $ENV npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["knockoutHitGrid tested","accuracy tested","profile reachable from StatRow","build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Daily Summary + share
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Matchday recap (new leader, mover/faller, table moves) from ScoreSnapshot deltas + share-to-chat.

**Verify:** npx vitest run lib/pool/recap.test.ts && env $ENV npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/pool/recap.ts","lib/pool/recap.test.ts","lib/pool/home.ts","app/pool/[code]/page.tsx","app/pool/[code]/RecapShare.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run lib/pool/recap.test.ts && env $ENV npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["computeRecap tested","daily summary on Home","share posts to chat","build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Motion + a11y + skeleton polish
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Final motion (odometer, spring reorder, LIVE pulse, stagger, +pts fly), skeletons, a11y across screens.

**Verify:** env $ENV npm run build && npx vitest run

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","components/ui/Odometer.tsx","components/ui/PointsFly.tsx","components/ui/StatRow.tsx","components/ui/ScoreCard.tsx","app/pool/[code]/table/loading.tsx","app/pool/[code]/bracket/loading.tsx","app/pool/[code]/matches/loading.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"env $ENV npm run build && npx vitest run","acceptanceCriteria":["odometer + spring reorder","LIVE pulse + stagger","+pts fly on realtime","reduced-motion respected","skeletons + focus + icons","build+tests green"]}
```
